entry.title: Creating IBP time periods including weights
entry.content:
Hi all,

I am looking for a smart way of creating time periods including weights for technical weeks etc. So far I have always uploaded the time periods provided in the SAP Best practice, however it ends in 2028! 

According to SAP help there are three options:

  • You can generate time periods using an application job in the Application Jobs app.

  • You can download a template with time periods in the Data Integration Jobs app and then upload them from the comma-separated values (CSV) file.

  • You can upload time periods from SAP Cloud Integration for data services.

Application job does not create weights, creating a file for Data Integration App is quite some work. But I have not figured out how to use CI-DS. Does anyone know? Or maybe you have a smart approach on how to create an upload file. Or of course you might even have it and are willing to share 😀 

Thanks in advance,

Maike

entry.title: Using XML-nodes in Transformation
entry.content:
Hi,

I´m splitting up an XML-file into single nodes and want to put that nodes into different XML-transformations.

My current code is this:

" iXML-Object

DATA(lo_ixml) = cl_ixml_core=>create( ).

" XML-Document

DATA(lo_xmldoc) = lo_ixml->create_document( ).

" Stream-Factory

DATA(lo_xmlsf) = lo_ixml->create_stream_factory( ).

" Stream

DATA(lo_stream) = lo_xmlsf->create_istream_xstring( string = lv_xstring ).

" Parser-Object

DATA(lo_parser) = lo_ixml->create_parser( document = lo_xmldoc

istream = lo_stream

stream_factory = lo_xmlsf ).

 

IF lo_parser->parse( ) = 0.

"Root-Node

DATA(lo_root) = lo_xmldoc->get_root_element( ).

 

" Get all E1EDKA1-nodes

DATA(lo_nodes_e1edka1) = lo_root->get_elements_by_tag_name( name = 'E1EDKA1' ).

" Iterator for found nodes

DATA(lo_node_iterator) = lo_nodes_e1edka1->create_iterator( ).

" first iterator-value

DATA(lo_nodes_temp) = lo_node_iterator->get_next( ).

" Iterate

WHILE NOT lo_nodes_temp IS INITIAL.

" Get child nodes

DATA(lo_node_children) = lo_nodes_temp->get_children( ).

" Get iterator for child nodes

DATA(lo_child_iterator) = lo_node_children->create_iterator( ).

" Get first child

DATA(lo_child_node) = lo_child_iterator->get_next( ).

 

I now want to loop over that nodes and want to call transformations for every node. I saw that there is a render-function, but how can I use that function to create XML-itabs from the nodes to use them in the transformation?

entry.title: Re: Ariba SLP - How to Stop ERP Sync in progress
entry.content:
Hello

In this case you can mark the message type "Request_In" as Failed and then you can select the Reprocess "Reprocess" in the status column and click on the Reprocess button.

entry.title: Re: How to verify, Second Mail is Add with SAP Universal ID or Not ?
entry.content: Am seeing the same issue as I also need to recertify. I had my old SAP account unlinked from my Universal ID and need to link a new account.

entry.title: Query about accruals in the rebate process 1B6 in S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

We are implementing the 1B6 rebate process in #SAP S/4HANA, and the client has a specific requirement regarding the accruals for the condition contract.

The objective is for the corresponding accruals to be reflected individually in the conditions of each sales document or invoice that contributes to the business volume of the condition contract (these could be statistical if it is only possible to settle the accruals through Settlement Management). This would provide greater predictability and clarity for the client when granting other types of discounts.

We are currently investigating whether this can be achieved using standard functionality in SAP S/4HANA or if a custom development would be required.

Has anyone worked on a similar scenario or has experience with this type of configuration? Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you in advance for your support!

Best regards,

Matías

Best  regards

Christian

entry.title: Re: How to Customize the Main Navigation Menu?
entry.content:
Hello,

You can go with the tool 'Text Replacement'.
Here you can set replscement text for default texts.

entry.title: Credit note automatically deducted from invoice balance
entry.content:
SAP B1 v10

Good afternoon,

When a credit note is created from an existing invoice, it automatically reduces the open balance. Is there a way around this? They are two documents with unique identifiers, but on Account balance or Internal reconciliation it is one line with balance and balance due. Sometime I need to be able to use just the credit note or the full original invoice value, particularly when allocating payments of course.

For example, if I issue a credit note to a customer for an invoice not yet due, more often than not that will be deducted from a payment before the customer has to pay the actual invoice. This means I have to leave a balance on another invoice until the original invoice is paid. Is there a better solution?

Hopefully this makes sense!

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP

entry.content:

@TuncayKaraca @Cocquerel

entry.title: Re: Incorrect escape parameter for tag : DescriptionOfNat...
entry.content:
Marc,

for facts with data type dtr-types:textBlockItemType issuers should always set the iXBRL attribute @escaped to ‘true’. Yes Agreed. Meanwhile, facts with other data types, such as xbrli:stringItemType should instead set the attribute @escape to ‘false’, as their values should not contain XHTML.

The question is about the xbrli:stringItemType tag.

Iwona

entry.title: Re: Dates and Roundings in Compensation
entry.content:
Hi Xavier (@xavierlegarrec)

I have a consultant who is trying to get your Example 5 code to work. It works just fine if the editable date column is changed from the default empty value. However, if you change another editable column on the worksheet (e.g. merit) then the 0/1 column changes to 1, even when the editable date field is still 'empty'. I have replicated his findings.

Can you help?

Phil

entry.title: Re: hxehost:53075 not responding
entry.content:
Hello Z-k,

you can disable the firewall permanently with "sudo systemctl disable firewalld".

See also the comment to the accepted solution.

Kind regards!

entry.title: Re: Provide UID audit history

Dear Team,

 

You can use Audit Log or Profile Audit Log to see the past events for the corresponding user.

 

Best Regards,

SAP Solution Support

entry.title: Re: IW37N how to generate a report with multiple Partner...
entry.content:
hello @Strebord ,

There is no feature to provide multiple partners entry on IW37N report but you can check this in Fiori report - Find Maintenance Order and Operation. If the report does not help then create a query between VIAUFKS and IHPA table and try to get the desired result.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Create Sales Order in S4/HANA from SAP IBP
entry.content: @Ryan, not a public cloud.

entry.title: SAP CPQ 2.0 Document generation - dynamic template selection with option to edit the content
entry.content:
Hello,

I am currently working on my first SAP CPQ implementation project as a consultant. Our customer has a specific requirement for document generation.

Context:

  • Configurable products
  • Multi-section templates
  • Various text templates as .docx files

Requirement: 

For a section in the final document, the customer requires a specific long text based on the combination of two specific product attributes. Additionally, the text should be editable before the document is created.

Problem: 

Using section templates, I cannot dynamically select a template file based on the combination of attributes. Currently, I can only upload one template for each section. While I know that I can replace the section template, I do not want the user to manually choose one template out of approximately 50 templates (from local storage) for this single segment of the final document. The "manage content documents" tab is not an option because the content of the templates must be editable.

Process:

  1. Define attributes from the configurable product (happens automatically with configuration).
  2. Automatically choose the specific template based on the values of the attributes (works only when content does not need to be edited).
  3. If necessary, edit the text of the template (problem).
  4. Create the final document with the edited text.

Could you please assist us with this issue?

Thank you very much for your help.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: Message Postings: add a new validity period ... from BAPI BAPI_RE_CN_CHANGE
entry.content:
Hi, 

I got it to work by only adding the new timeslice.  The BAPI automatically ends the old timeslice of the payment term (BAPI table TERM_PAYMENT).

 

Good luck,

Lou

Regards,

Ryan Crosby

entry.title: Re: Possible to add a new supplier whose master data does...
entry.content:
Hi,

A one-time vendor refers to a vendor from whom materials are not procured frequently, typically used for occasional purchases or for obtaining quotations. Procurement from such vendors may occur once a year or on a need basis.

The process of creating a one-time vendor is similar to creating a regular vendor using transactions XK01 or FK01. The key difference lies in the Vendor Account Group. A separate account group is defined for one-time vendors, requiring only minimal vendor information during creation.

For one-time vendors, the vendor's address and other relevant accounting details are maintained at the time of creating the Purchase Order (PO) and Invoice Receipt (IR).

If you need to convert a one-time vendor into a regular vendor, you can update the vendor account group and maintain any additional data required for regular vendors.

Regards

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content: @graziela I would like to ask a question regarding the /5PY wage type generating a negative amount on the W-2 form for concurrent employment. Is there a way we can move the /5PY wage type to RT_Person, and what would be the impact if we make changes to Table V_T7CCE_PERS_WGT and V_T7CCE_CUM_RT_P with an effective date starting from the beginning of this year? I believe this could cause issues during the retro run. Do we have any solutions to avoid the negative /5PY at the personnel number level?

entry.title: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should auto approve
entry.content:
We have problem with approval of service entry sheets.
The SES should auto approve but after sending for approval they remain in status 'In Approval' (20) .

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Service Entry Sheet remains 'in approval' but should...
entry.content:
This issue is covered in KBA 3258263.

When a Service Entry Sheet is sent for approval, the system tries to generate a goods receipt in the background from the workflow processing. If the generation of the goods receipt fails for any reason (eg: reference purchase order locked, cost center does not exist, posting period not open, account determination missing etc.), then the work item will be set in error, and the status of the Service Entry Sheet will remain open. 

Check the workflow log to know the reason the posting failed, follow below steps:

  1. Open the App 'Flexible Workflow Administration' enter document ID and prefix * has to be entered in the filter option Business object ID and click on Go. 
  2. Open the workflow that is in error.
  3. Click on 'Workflow Log' button appearing right side top corner.
  4. expand the entry in error.
  5. Again, expand the further errors where understandable error appears.

Once the issue has been corrected, resend the work item using resume button or send the Service Entry Sheet for approval again.

entry.title: Is output print preview button available in Manage Sales Order V2 App?
entry.content:
Hi All,

We are using the Manage Sales Order Version 2 app in Fiori to create and modify sales orders. However, we do not see an option for the Output Print Preview button in this app. Does this app support this functionality by default? If not, is it possible to add this button? Are there any additional configurations or settings required to enable this feature?

entry.title: [ Unable to find service undefined ] SAP Business Application Studio does't connect to Cloud Foundry
entry.content:
I have been creating views in Hana Studio for years and now I want to configure BTP Trial to see how to do this using SAP Business Application Studio.

When I try do Add Data Source in Projection:

There's a message:

Unable to find service undefined

I'm tryng to connect the SAP Business Application Studio with the Cloud Foundry, but when I click, the option does not open to the input required fields:

  • Select Cloud Foundry Organization
  • Select Cloud Foundry Space 

Does anyone know how to make this connection between SAP Business Application Studio and the Cloud Foundry Trial base?

Christophe

It's going to be the Plume distribution 🙂

entry.title: Re: Selecting a control from different pages using a rule...
entry.content:
You have it just about right but you will want to include #Value in your target path to get the value of the control as opposed to the control reference.  I did a quick test using this rule and it worked as expected.

export default function GetTabFieldValues(context) {
    let ta_sp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabA/#Control:FCSimpleProp/#Value');
    let ta_lp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabA/#Control:FCListPicker/#SelectedValue');
    let tb_sp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabB/#Control:FCSimpleProp/#Value');
    let tb_lp = context.evaluateTargetPath('#Page:TabB/#Control:FCListPicker/#SelectedValue');

    console.log(`Tab A - ${ta_sp} - ${ta_lp}`);
    console.log(`Tab B - ${tb_sp} - ${tb_lp}`);

    return context.getPageProxy().executeAction({
        "Name": '/SCN_00045/Actions/GenericMessageBox.action',
        "Properties": {
            "Message": `Tab A - ${ta_sp} - ${ta_lp}\nTab B - ${tb_sp} - ${tb_lp}`
        }
    });
}

entry.title: Has anyone experience with within a month go-live for a S/4HANA migration? I need some advices.
entry.content:
We are about to plan the Go-Live for our S/4HANA Greenfield implementation project.

The plan is to use a public holiday + weekend to go live. This should happen withing the month. Which risks are you seeing here? Can you provide me with some advices?

Many Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Flexible Workflow Manager roles
entry.content:
Hi Alejandro, 

Thank you very much for your feedback. I have found the cause of the error. The position and organizational unit from the organizational structure (PPOME) were not transferred to the HR Masta Data (PA30), so there was an inconsistency here. After I corrected the data in the HR Master Data, the processor rule worked and the manager was found.

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors_unable to default a HRIS field value a...
entry.content:
Hi @DRP07 , 

as said, posting the same answer here as in the original thread for completeness. 

My EC colleague checked the use case you'd like to fulfill.

From her analysis, OnView is the right scenario for this case and it works when the value already exist for country. It seems to be not working if there is no value for country. This looks like a bug, that needs to be fixed.

Please create a customer support case for the same and post it for EC WorkPermit.

Thanks a lot and BR, Sylvia

entry.title: Webservice - grac_risk_analysis_wout_no_ws - how to get the composite role in the result?
entry.content:
Hi SAP-community,

is it possible to get the causing composite role in the result of the webservice grac_risk_analysis_wout_no_ws? I can successfully simulate adding a composite role and I see the resulting risks. But I can only see which single roles cause the risk but not the corresponding causing composite role.

Any ideas if it is possible?

 

Thanks and best regards

Jörn

entry.title: Re: Maintenance Item Have Different Start Cycle
entry.content:
hello @Ariel09 ,

Maintenance cycle is assigned to the header of maintenance plan. If you want a different cycle for each maintenance item then create a separate plan for each item. I am assuming that you have different equipment with each maintenance item. 

Assignment of maintenance cycle to item is not available.

Vaibhav Mishra

entry.title: Re: Issue to asset from Project stock(Q)
entry.content:
Hi Fatima

SAP includes movement type 241. However, this movement type does not support special stock.

Did you try copy this movement type and modify it?

Did you find a solution for your problem?

Regards

entry.title: ArcGIS license requirement to use GEF in SSAM
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

We are implementing SAP Service and Asset Manager. To use the map functionality, we can either use GIS or GEF. I understand that using GIS requires an ArcGIS license.

Is it possible to use GEF integration with SAP Service and Asset Manager to enable the map functionality without an ArcGIS license?

I came across the following thread regarding this, but it’s not clear to me. Could anyone please explain?

SAP Asset Manager GEF - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: MDK Client SDK 24.4.3 - Cannot install NativeScript 8...
entry.content: Bill - Thank you for your reply. For now, we need to continue to build with MDK Client SDK 24.4.3 and we need to build with configurations approved by SAP. Therefore, I implemented option 2 that you provided. However, I used Node.js 18.20.5 which is the latest LTS release for Node.js 18 and meets the "^18.17.0" requirement of the recently modified NativeScript 8.6.5 dependency.

entry.title: Re: ServerCrash
entry.content: Hi! You are welcome! If you install the SAP MMC on your (Windows) computer and use it to open the snapshot (the "zip" file mentioned at the initial question), you can right click on the ICM process there and choose to open the developer trace. Once on that screen, use the search feature (on the bottom) to search for "stack" and verify whether the c-stack is there. Without the c-stack, we cannot verify whether this is a known issue (and an SAP Note delivering a fix was already released) or a new issue. Another option to get the c-stack is to check whether a "core" file was created at Linux level (SAP Note 1163337). If yes, the c-stack can be extracted from the "core" file: https://help.sap.com/docs/SUPPORT_CONTENT/si/3362959726.html

thanks

entry.title: Re: Not able to accept or decline work order revision
entry.content: I faced this same issue so I stumbled on your question which had no answer. I figured it out so I thought I would share my findings. If you re-save the .csv with a new name (I added a 2 at the end of the original name) then I went into the file and reworded my comments and resorted a column so the data was in a different order and saved. Maybe it was overkill but after I did all of that, the upload worked. I think FG just doesn't like seeing the same exact file 2x in a row.

entry.title: Re: HELP: Server system requirement for Enqueue Replicati...
entry.content:
Hello,

The Enqueue Replication (ERS) is part of the system, and it will run SAP kernel processes.

So, for the OS part, you can use the same OSs supported by the SAP product in use.

For CPU, RAM and disk space, the requirements would be the same as for your ASCS instance (where the Enqueue Server is running).

Regards,

Isaías

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Migration Cockpit-upgraded to release 2023, Assets Master Data and Posting not visib
entry.content:
Dear Desislava,

Since you mentioned that "the objects of this new release are not visible in existing projects", and I don't know your previous SAP S/4HANA release, if you:

  • Try to create a new Migration Project using the Staging Tables migration approach, are the Migration Objects "Fixed asset - Master data" and "Fixed asset - Postings" available for usage?

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: Superior Functional Location
entry.content:
Hi,

You can't change Mass Functional location structure data tab by using IL05 except General and Location data tab.

So you need to create batch recording by using LSMW.

 

Regards

entry.title: Katowice - SAP Stammtisch 26.02.2025
entry.content:
Hi all!

let's meet on February 26th and plan the next SAP Community activities in Katowice, as well as talk about what's new in the SAP world, about interesting SAP projects in the region, and what's new with ourselves.  This time we will meet at Upojeni Pub in Katowice! 

During the SAP Stammtisch, we will set a date for the next SAP Stammtisch and discuss about planned SAP Code Jam and SAP Meet-up in 2025.

Please let us know if you will participate in SAP Stammtisch Katowice by clicking "I will attend" - if you do that, I believe, this will encourage others to come too and also help us to make a table reservation in advance. Thank you🙂

If you are not a member of the Katowice Group, please feel invited to join: SAP Community Katowice

If you are hesitant about coming, maybe you will be convinced by reading the most recent report from a similar event: SAP-Stammtisch

If you can't join this time, write in the comments below your proposals for the next meeting date.

entry.title: Sybase License on Nutanix AHV
entry.content:
How can I do the download of the sysamcap 2.4?

I need to generate a Sybase ASE License for a VM that is on a Nutanix AHV host.

entry.title: LET´S TALK Transformation: Interactive sessions with smalls group of customers to discuss.
entry.content: Embarking on a cloud journey? You're in for an exciting ride! But let's face it, aligning strategies, teams, and investments can be a real challenge. Collaboration is key to nailing your project and driving business value. Migrating to the cloud isn't just about software; it's about evolving processes to stay competitive and meet customer demands. Tech is a powerful enabler, but it's not the transformation itself. That's where you come in. In the past year, we've chatted with over 300 customers about their transformation strategies. We've found that while many organizations have a vision, they struggle to align internally and make it a reality. Sound familiar? Guess what? We've taken those insights (and some great research from SAP) and built a transformation framework just for you. It's made up of 11 elements across three key areas:  1)Business Area Strategy  2)Transformation Tactical Components  3)Technology Enablement.              Want to dive deeper? Join our **1:Few Sessions**! Our Solution Value Advisory experts will lead interactive discussions on the most relevant topics within our Business Transformation Framework. Sessions repeat monthly, so pick the topics and dates that work best for you. Ready to transform your transformation? We can't wait to see you there!  Link to review available sessions. Click to review global calendar for H1_2025

entry.title: Financial document is not replicated in sales order item
entry.content:
Hi Experts

When new items are added to the sales order from the contract, the financial document number recorded in the sales order header is not replicated in the new items.

What is required is that the new items inherit the financial document number that is recorded in the sales order header.

Please let me know how I can solve this problem

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Hana DB: Feature not supported on this instance
entry.content:
Hi @DebashishDas,

The error seems to have been resolved. Today I was able to update the configuration without issues.

entry.title: Re: How to make planned orders and production/process ord...
entry.content:
Hi,

Check this note 71014 - Capa.planning table:Status-dep.color select.for objs

Regards

entry.title: Re: Crystal reports 2020 : The document could not be opened
entry.content:
I can reproduce the problem.

  1. Create a new report.
  2. Create two formula fields: one returning 'left' and the other returning 'right'.
  3. Place both fields in the body.
  4. Set a different font for the left field and make it BOLD.
  5. Save the report and close it.
  6. Reopen it; it works. Now, use the brush tool to replicate the font and bold formatting from the right field to the left field.
  7. Save it and close it again.
  8. Try reopening it. Boom.

I have the same problem .. waiting for patch.. dont use Brush.

entry.title: Re: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content: We already tried to refresh the channel but still not working

entry.title: Re: Important Notice: Changes in SAP Analytics Cloud Classic Stories & Analytic Applications
entry.content:
@wolfgang_ziegler01 @Brad_Enright we have updated the timelines to reflect the shift in delivery timelines for Blended Tables.

Regards,

Tunir

entry.title: Re: Financial document is not replicated in sales order item
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you done PGI against new item line?

entry.title: Re: SAP XI/PI excel to custom RFC
entry.content:
I didn't say anything about a "channel". (In fact, I don't even know what a "channel" is...)

The JCo cache is JavaVM-wide, so if XI/PO does not have a button that says "Clear Cache", then you will need a restart of the Java VM (which means restart of the XI/PO system).

entry.title: Re: Financial document is not replicated in sales order item
entry.content: Hi Raheel

entry.title: Re: Financial document is not replicated in sales order item
entry.content: Hi Raheel, What is PGI and how is it done please

Does it not allow option for users to save tiles as their favorites.

Regards,
Rajan Murthy

entry.title: Re: U.S Tax Reporter Year End 2024
entry.content:
Is anybody else having issues with the Maine PFML tax coming out?

Steve

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content:
Hello @Sandra_Rossi, as I understand then to avoid calling the AVL painting, I must update in first instance the internal table TT_RDATA, and then, made the change, I can automatically insert it to the DB (without using a save button), this is correct? under this premise, I made the change in the routine to delete records and it is working without problems, I attach the code that I am applying to see if I am doing the correct thing, or I am redundant in deletion processes:

FORM DELETE_DATA USING pi_tabindex.

    DATA: gr_alv_grid       TYPE REF TO cl_gui_alv_grid,
          lt_selected_rows  TYPE lvc_t_row,
          lv_index          TYPE lvc_index,
          ls_selected_row   TYPE ts_data,
          rv_cod            TYPE INT4,
          rv_msg            TYPE STRING.

    CLEAR: rv_cod, rv_msg.

    " Read the selected row of the internal table you are displaying in the ALV
    READ TABLE tt_rdata INTO ls_selected_row INDEX pi_tabindex.
    IF sy-subrc = 0.

      " Confirmation dialog box
      CALL FUNCTION 'POPUP_TO_CONFIRM'
        EXPORTING
          titlebar      = 'Delete Record'
          text_question = '¿Are you sure to delete the selected record?'
          text_button_1 = 'Yes'
          icon_button_1 = 'ICON_OKAY'
          text_button_2 = 'No'
          icon_button_2 = 'ICON_CANCEL'
        IMPORTING
          answer        = v_ans.

      IF v_ans NE 'A'.
        IF v_ans EQ '1'. " User confirms deletion

          " Delete the record from the internal table
          DELETE tt_rdata INDEX pi_tabindex.

          IF sy-subrc = 0.
            " Calling the method to delete the record in the database
            ObjBenMto->DelData(
              EXPORTING
                p_prm1 = ls_selected_row-almorigen
                p_prm2 = ls_selected_row-idreg
                p_prm3 = ls_selected_row-reftexto
                p_prm4 = ls_selected_row-sku
              IMPORTING
                lv_cod = rv_cod
                lv_msg = rv_msg ).

            IF rv_cod EQ 1.
              gv_flag = 'X'.
              COMMIT WORK.
              MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
            ELSE.
              ROLLBACK WORK.
              MESSAGE rv_msg TYPE 'I'.
            ENDIF.

          ELSE.
            MESSAGE 'The record could not be found in the internal table.' TYPE 'E'.
          ENDIF.

        ELSE. " User cancels deletion
          MESSAGE 'Deletion canceled by the user.' TYPE 'I'.
        ENDIF.

      ELSE.
        MESSAGE 'Process canceled by the user.' TYPE 'I'.
      ENDIF.

    ENDIF.

  ENDFORM.

entry.title: Re: Can we report on test results on items in the LMS?
entry.content: The User Exam Data & User Quiz Data reports should provide those details.

entry.title: Re: Batch Number Assignment
entry.content:
Please also take a look at the following KBA:

  • 3552911 - Batch Number Range for Plant Not Applied During New Batch Creation

In this KBA you can get more information regarding the batch number range for plant.

Thanks and regards,
Mateus

entry.title: Re: Check maximum days - Time Off Business Rule
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

is there an solution to this one? I have now a couple of years the same issue. What would propably work is to check the payout amount via integration and save it in a custom MDF Object. This could be checked via the Payout Validation rules.

But this work around seems a bit to much effor as also in the implementation guide: Creating Error Messages for Time Account Payout | SAP Help Portal its mentioned as a example szenario. @TB  Would you maybe have an Idea?

Thanks

Marius

SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Re: LEAVE TO SCREEN 0 AFTER REFRESH ALV IS NOT WORKING
entry.content: ALV and database content are two completely different things. If you want to change the database contents, it's advised to implement a SAVE button and transfer the ALV contents to the database. Maybe you are confused that the ABAP statements INSERT, MODIFY and DELETE can be used either for updating an internal table or for updating a database, e.g. "INSERT wa INTO TABLE itab" is for an internal table, "INSERT dbtab FROM TABLE itab" is for inserting lines into a database table. See the ABAP documentation for more information.

entry.title: writing approval condition
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I am trying to write an approval query to send vendor invoices without a base document for approval, but since the BaseType field is not a physical field, I cannot see the item and column numbers. How should I write the query? Writing it as $[$OPCH."BaseType"] does not work. Please help me. 

Regards,

entry.content: Thanks for the solution

entry.title: Import data from BW Bex query to SAC system
entry.content:
Hello,

I acquire data from BW Bex query to SAC system and mapped the fields. The data was refreshed successfully into SAC. Now I require to add one more field and assign new fields or calculated column to previous default mapping.

But I am unable to edit the mappings or BW Bex query to add additional field in SAC. Just showing view mode only.

Is it something I don’t have authorization to edit the existing mappings or SAC tool itself is not provided to edit the mappings.

Please clarify me.

Regards,

Vasu
